heading: Supervision and control of project
label: 494 Supervision and control of project
text: The provisions of this chapter shall be subject to the duties and authority of the Secretary of Defense and the departments and agencies of the Department of Defense as provided in the National Security Act of 1947.
notes: References in TextThe National Security Act of 1947, referred to in text, is , , which is classified principally to chapter 44 (§ 3001 et seq.) of this title. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.act July 26, 1947, ch. 34361 Stat. 495
Change of Name“Department of Defense” substituted in text for “National Military Establishment” on authority of , .act Aug. 10, 1949, ch. 412, § 12(a)63 Stat. 591
